# nullcloud_cluster (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud Kubernetes cluster by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_cluster" "example" {
  id = "k8s-abc123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Kubernetes cluster.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `node_count` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_ids` (List of String)
- `version` (String)
